name: Broccoli Garden Soup
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large pot, cover the yams with 2 cups of chicken broth and simmer for 10 minutes or until soft. Remove from heat and puree in a food mill or blender.
2. Heat olive oil in a large pot over medium heat. Add onions and garlic; sauté until onions are translucent and beginning to brown.
3. Add celery and cook for a few minutes longer.
4. Stir in the broccoli and remaining chicken broth. Cover and simmer on low heat for 8 minutes or until tender-crisp.
5. Return the puree from step 1 to the pot, then stir in seasonings.
6. Serve immediately or chill. Top each serving with 1/4 cup chopped watercress. Makes 11 one-cup servings.
Nutrient content per serving: 225 calories, 2 grams fat, 4 grams protein, 50 grams carbohydrate, .6 milligrams cholesterol, 509 milligrams sodium, .4 milligrams beta carotene.
